description.unified: Deals of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies in a straight line ahead, stunning them for [1 sec->1.8 sec]. Deals an additional of Attack Power as Physical Damage to non-hero enemies. [Experiment Successful!]: No cooldown is incurred.

Deals of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting them with [Explosive Material] for 7 sec, which increases Physical Damage taken by [20%->25%] and blinds them for [1 sec->2.4 sec]. [Experiment Successful!]: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.

Attaches a sticky bomb to a random enemy. After 3 sec, the bomb explodes, dealing of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies and stunning them for [1 sec->1.8 sec]. Enemies with [Explosive Material] take an additional of Attack Power as Physical Damage. [Experiment Successful!]: The bomb explodes immediately upon attaching, triggering its effects.

On Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to fire a shell that deals of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies, stunning them for [1 sec->1.2 sec]. At the end of each skill, attempts an [Experiment]. There is a 50% chance for success, which empowers the next skill. Empowered skills do not attempt an [Experiment].

dark.unified: Increases the duration of Blind by [1 sec->1.2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->1000], and the number of bomb placements is changed to 2.
Shell activation chance is increased by [25%->10%], and stun duration is increased by [0.5 sec->0.6 sec].

dark.unified: On [Experiment] success, increases Attack Speed by [12%->300%] and Status Ailment Accuracy by [150->300] for 10 sec.

description.unified: [Experiment] success chance is increased by {0}%. On [Experiment] success, Attack increases by {1}%, Attack Speed by {2}%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by {3}%. This effect stacks up to [3->4] times and cannot be dispelled.
